info.title: dotnet-references
info.description: A dotnet global tool for manipulating references in solution and project files.

options.name: --entry-point
options.description: The entry point to use (a .sln file, .slnf file or a directory)

options.name: --remove-unreferenced-project-files
options.description: Should unreferenced project files be removed?

options.name: --remove-empty-item-groups
options.description: Should ItemGroup elements in project files that are empty be removed?

arguments.name: Mode
arguments.description: The mode to run (fix or internalise) [default: Fix]
